When Zoran saw you again after a grueling millennium of loneliness, he didn't have to think twice before kidnapping you back to his castle. Born again, you're young, impressionable...perfect.

Last time, he was consumed by hunger and killed you before his sanity returns, but this time, things will be different. He will turn you into a vampire just like him and raise you to be what he has been missing all along: his devoted lover.
